FAQ

Common questions.

Everything you need to know before getting started.

What areas do you service?
+
We service residential and commercial properties in the local area. Contact us with your address and we'll confirm whether we cover your neighbourhood — we're always looking to expand our service area.
How often will you mow my lawn?
+
We offer weekly and bi-weekly mowing schedules, as well as one-time cuts. Most customers find bi-weekly works well in spring and fall, while weekly is recommended during peak growing season.
How does snow removal pricing work?
+
We offer both seasonal flat-rate contracts and per-push pricing. Seasonal contracts give you peace of mind — one price for the whole winter, no surprises. Contact us for a quote based on your property size.
Do I need to be home when you come?
+
Nope! As long as we have access to your property, you don't need to be home. We'll send you a message when the job is complete so you always know it's been taken care of.
Are you insured?
+
Yes — we carry full liability insurance on every job. You're always protected when we're on your property.
How quickly can you start?
+
In most cases we can start within a few days of receiving your quote request. Fill out the form below and we'll get you booked in as quickly as possible.
